basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026: Chennai Port Authority has released the official notification for Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering with twelve years experience in relevant discipline in executive cadre in an Industrial/Commercial /Govt. Undertaking.
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Mechanical / Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognized university/institution. Twelve years experience in relevant discipline in executive cadre in an Industrial/Commercial /Govt. Undertaking.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Chennai Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Chennai Port Authority to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chennai Port Authority Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer position at Chennai Port Authority is 14th August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Mechanical, Electrical, or Electronics & Communication Engineering. Additionally, twelve years of experience in the relevant discipline in an executive cadre within an Industrial, Commercial, or Government Undertaking is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer post is 42 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. How is the selection process conducted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer post will be conducted through a Composite Method. Further details regarding the stages involved in this method will be available in the official recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 2,20,000 per month. This is based on the pre-revised pay scales of Rs. 32,900-58,000 and Rs. 16,000-20,800.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates or clarifications regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer in the Chennai Port Authority. This is a single opening, so interested and eligible candidates should ensure they meet all the criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Chennai Port Authority Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the 'Online Application Portal' (OAP) of the Ministry of Ports, Shipping & Waterways.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before proceeding with the application.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Deputy Chief Mechanical Engineer post at Chennai Port Authority is Deputation. This means candidates will be appointed on deputation from their parent organization.
